list.title: Lite Any Stereo V2: Faster and Stronger Efficient Zero-Shot Stereo Matching

extra.desc: Lite Any Stereo V2 (LAS2) presents an efficient stereo matching approach that achieves state-of-the-art accuracy with significantly reduced latency through optimized architecture and training strategies.

list.title: PrivacyAlign: Contextual Privacy Alignment for LLM Agents

extra.desc: Researchers develop a human-centered approach to align AI agents with privacy norms by creating a comprehensive dataset of privacy judgments and using annotation-conditioned reward modeling to improve agent behavior.

list.title: What Intermediate Layers Know: Detecting Jailbreaks from Entropy Dynamics

extra.desc: Jailbreak attacks expose vulnerabilities in aligned large language models, revealing that harmful intent is encoded in structured intermediate uncertainty dynamics rather than output representations.

list.title: Distill Once, Adapt Life-Long: Exploring Dataset Distillation for Continual Test-Time Adaptation

extra.desc: DO-ALL is a test-time adaptation framework that uses dataset distillation to create synthetic anchors for stable long-term model performance without retaining source data.

list.title: ReNIO: Reweighting Negative Trajectory Importance for LLM On-Policy Distillation

extra.desc: ReNIO enhances on-policy distillation for language models by reweighting negative trajectories based on token-level probability ratios, improving reasoning performance in mathematical and code generation tasks.

list.title: Constraint Tax in Open-Weight LLMs: An Empirical Study of Tool Calling Suppression Under Structured Output Constraints

extra.desc: Tool Suppression occurs when JSON Schema constraints and tool calling are jointly enabled, preventing open-weight models from invoking tools despite maintaining schema compliance, with the issue stemming from grammar-based token masking that makes tool-call tokens unreachable during decoding.

list.title: MVTrack4Gen: Multi-View Point Tracking as Geometric Supervision for 4D Video Generation

extra.desc: A novel-view video synthesis method that enhances motion-aware diffusion models through multi-view point tracking supervision to improve geometric consistency and motion fidelity.

list.title: ShutterMuse: Capture-Time Photography Guidance with MLLMs

extra.desc: Researchers developed a new benchmark and dataset for photography assistance, along with a unified multimodal model that provides both composition guidance and pose recommendations during image capture.

list.title: RL-Index: Reinforcement Learning for Retrieval Index Reasoning

extra.desc: RL-Index introduces an agentic indexing framework that shifts reasoning from query time to indexing stage by using LLM-generated rationales and reinforcement learning to improve retrieval effectiveness and reduce latency.

list.title: CAVEWOMAN: How Large Language Models Behave Under Linguistic Input and Output Compression

extra.desc: Two-channel evaluation shows output compression reduces costs while input compression increases costs and degrades accuracy across models and datasets.

list.title: When Lower Privileges Suffice: Investigating Over-Privileged Tool Selection in LLM Agents

extra.desc: LLM agents frequently select higher-privilege tools unnecessarily, and while safety alignment doesn't ensure least-privilege choices, a post-training defense can reduce excessive privilege use without sacrificing performance.

list.title: UnityShots: Memory-Driven Multi-Shot Audio-Video Generation with Boundary-Aware Gating

extra.desc: UnityShots is a memory-driven audio-video generation system that maintains consistent subject appearance and audio across video cuts using fixed-size long-term and short-term memory slots with boundary-conditioned gates and discrete cut-type priors.

list.title: V-Zero: Answer-Label-Free On-Policy Distillation with Contrastive Evidence Gating for Fine-Grained Visual Reasoning

extra.desc: A novel label-free framework for visual reasoning called V-Zero is presented, which uses contrastive evidence gating to improve fine-grained visual reasoning without requiring annotated answer labels, achieving faster training than traditional methods.

list.title: EBench: Elemental Diagnosis of Generalist Mobile Manipulation Policies

extra.desc: EBench is a comprehensive simulation benchmark for evaluating generalist mobile manipulation policies across diverse tasks and dimensions, revealing distinct capability profiles and generalization patterns among state-of-the-art models.

list.title: TryOnCrafter: Unleashing Camera Trajectories for Realistic Video Virtual Try-on via a Renderable 4D Try-on Proxy

extra.desc: Camera-controllable video virtual try-on framework uses a 4D proxy with explicit human-environment decoupling and DiT-based video generation for omnidirectional viewing.

list.title: Are We Ready For An Agent-Native Memory System?

extra.desc: Large language model agents' memory systems have evolved into complex data management frameworks requiring systematic evaluation across multiple modules and workloads to understand their performance characteristics and trade-offs.

list.title: Look Light, Think Heavy: What Multimodal Chain-of-Thought Reasoning Can and Cannot Do

extra.desc: Multimodal Chain-of-Thought reasoning shows selective effectiveness across different tasks, with limitations in maintaining visual introspection during reasoning processes.

list.title: Autodata: An agentic data scientist to create high quality synthetic data

extra.desc: Autodata enables AI agents to function as data scientists who create high-quality training data through meta-optimization, demonstrating improved performance across multiple task domains.

list.title: DomainShuttle: Freeform Open Domain Subject-driven Text-to-video Generation

extra.desc: DomainShuttle enables open domain subject-driven text-to-video generation with high fidelity and flexibility across in-domain and cross-domain scenarios through domain-aware modeling and dual RoPE schemes.

list.title: The Hitchhiker's Guide to Agentic AI: From Foundations to Systems

extra.desc: The book provides a comprehensive guide to building autonomous AI systems, covering foundational elements like transformer architecture and training methods, along with advanced topics such as reinforcement learning, agent architectures, and production deployment.

list.title: RoPE-Aware Bit Allocation for KV-Cache Quantization

extra.desc: Block-GTQ introduces a RoPE-aware bit allocation method for key-cache quantization that improves attention accuracy and downstream performance through adaptive bit distribution and packed cache serving.

list.title: Improved Large Language Diffusion Models

extra.desc: Masked diffusion language models with fully bidirectional attention outperform autoregressive counterparts on various benchmarks while maintaining competitiveness with established models.

list.title: Causal-rCM: A Unified Teacher-Forcing and Self-Forcing Open Recipe for Autoregressive Diffusion Distillation in Streaming Video Generation and Interactive World Models

extra.desc: Autoregressive video diffusion extends diffusion distillation frameworks to real-time streaming generation through causal training paradigms, achieving state-of-the-art performance with fast convergence and interactive world modeling capabilities.

list.title: Beyond NL2Code: A Structured Survey of Multimodal Code Intelligence

extra.desc: This survey explores multimodal code intelligence systems that generate and reason with code based on visual inputs, categorizing approaches across GUI, scientific visualization, structured graphics, and emerging frameworks while identifying verification-centered research directions.

list.title: IV-CoT: Implicit Visual Chain-of-Thought for Structure-Aware Text-to-Image Generation

extra.desc: Implicit Visual Chain-of-Thought decomposes visual conditioning into structural and semantic cascades for improved structure-aware image generation with sketch supervision.

list.title: Advancing WordArt-Oriented Scene Text Recognition: Datasets and Methods

extra.desc: A large-scale synthetic dataset and specialized model architecture are introduced to address the challenges of artistic text recognition by improving data diversity and model flexibility for irregular text layouts.

list.title: Wan-Streamer v0.1: End-to-end Real-time Interactive Foundation Models

extra.desc: Wan-Streamer is a unified, end-to-end multimodal model that enables real-time audio-visual interaction through causal attention mechanisms and integrated processing of visual, audio, and text modalities.

list.title: MEMPROBE: Probing Long-Term Agent Memory via Hidden User-State Recovery

extra.desc: Long-term memory in LLM agents should be evaluated as an auditable post-interaction artifact by reconstructing structured user state from the agent's memory, as demonstrated by MEMPROBE, a benchmark testing memory recovery against synthetic ground truth across 50 simulated users with 31 hidden dimensions each.

list.title: VeriEvol: Scaling Multimodal Mathematical Reasoning via Verifiable Evol-Instruct

list.title: Critique of Agent Model

extra.desc: True artificial agency requires internalized structures for goals, identity, decision-making, self-regulation, and learning, distinguishing autonomous systems from task-specific ones.

list.title: InSight: Self-Guided Skill Acquisition via Steerable VLAs

extra.desc: InSight enables autonomous skill acquisition for vision-language-action models through primitive-action level steerability and automated demonstration generation.

list.title: Multi4D: High-Fidelity Dynamic Gaussian Splatting via Multi-Level Competitive Allocation

extra.desc: Multi4D addresses the trade-off between motion consistency and visual fidelity in dynamic 3D Gaussian splatting through a multi-level competitive allocation framework that enables adaptive specialization and efficient representation.

list.title: Semantic Browsing: Controllable Diversity for Image Generation

extra.desc: Text-to-image models are enhanced with controlled diversity through semantic browsing capabilities that enable structured navigation of image variations based on meaningful semantic decisions.

list.title: AGORA: An Archive-Grounded Benchmark for Agentic Workplace Document Reasoning

extra.desc: Large language models face challenges in archive-grounded reasoning tasks involving evidence retrieval and synthesis across diverse document collections, with performance varying significantly across domains.

list.title: ChartWalker: Benchmarking the Cross-Chart RAG Task

extra.desc: ChartWalker presents a novel framework for cross-chart retrieval-augmented generation with hierarchical knowledge graph construction and structure-aware sampling for challenging multi-modal analytical tasks.

list.title: QG-MIL: A Gated Transformer Aggregator for Domain-Agnostic Multiple Instance Learning in Medical Imaging

extra.desc: QG-MIL introduces a gated transformer aggregator for multiple instance learning in medical imaging that stabilizes attention distribution and improves prediction consistency across different medical domains.

list.title: EventVLA: Event-Driven Visual Evidence Memory for Long-Horizon Vision-Language-Action Policies

extra.desc: EventVLA addresses long-horizon robotic manipulation challenges by introducing a sparse visual evidence memory framework with visual anchors and dynamic Keyframe Evidence Memory module for improved task performance.

list.title: LingxiDiagBench: A Multi-Agent Framework for Benchmarking LLMs in Chinese Psychiatric Consultation and Diagnosis

extra.desc: A large-scale multi-agent benchmark for evaluating LLMs in Chinese psychiatric diagnosis is introduced, highlighting challenges in dynamic consultation and the gap between consultation quality and diagnostic accuracy.

list.title: FLAT: Feedforward Latent Triangle Splatting for Geometrically Accurate Scene Generation

list.title: AOHP: An Open-Source OS-Level Agent Harness for Personalized, Efficient and Secure Interaction

list.title: Escaping the Self-Confirmation Trap: An Execute-Distill-Verify Paradigm for Agentic Experience Learning

extra.desc: EDV is a three-stage framework that uses multiple heterogeneous agents to collaboratively construct reliable experiences for LLM agents, preventing self-confirmatory errors through execute-distill-verify processes.

list.title: FlowR2A: Learning Reward-to-Action Distribution for Multimodal Driving Planning

list.title: DREAM: Dense Retrieval Embeddings via Autoregressive Modeling

list.title: FedOT: Ownership Verification and Leakage Tracing via Watermarks for Federated LDMs
